name: Forbidden Crown
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>禁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>じられた<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>冠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Apply these effects to 1 face-up monster on the field, until the end of this turn.
● Negate its effects.
● Cannot attack.
● Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
● Unaffected by activated card effects, except its own.
● Cannot be Tributed.
● Cannot be used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon.
Neither player can activate monster effects in response to this card's activation. You can only activate 1 "Forbidden Crown" per turn.
eff:

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Cannot be used as a Fusion Material
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
Cannot be used as a Link Material
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
